title: Bailando
why_this_song: Bailando by Enrique Iglesias (2014) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 16 times; first heard in: "Ya no puedo más (ya no puedo más)"
Appears 16 times; first heard in: "Yo quiero estar contigo"
Appears 7 times; first heard in: "La noche en la que te suplico que no salga el sol"
Appears 6 times; first heard in: "La cerveza y el tequila, y tu boca con la mía"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: Tu cuerpo y el mío llenando el vacío
Tener contigo una noche loca (una noche loca)
Ay, besar tu boca (y besar tu boca)

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "bailando" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "bailando" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "puedo" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "puedo" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Ay, besar tu boca (y besar tu boca)
Ya no puedo más (ya no puedo más)

exercises.prompt_en: What kind of person do you imagine the narrator of "Bailando" is? Describe their age, mood, and situation using at least three details from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: Que tipo de pessoa você imagina ser o narrador de "Bailando"? Descreva a idade, o humor e a situação usando pelo menos três detalhes da letra.

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask Enrique Iglesias one question about "Bailando", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para Enrique Iglesias sobre "Bailando", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Rewrite the chorus of "Bailando" in your own words — keep the meaning but change the style (formal, slang, poetic, whatever you like).
exercises.prompt_pt: Reescreva o refrão de "Bailando" com suas palavras — mantenha o sentido mas mude o estilo (formal, gíria, poético, o que preferir).
